title: Gears of Innovation
description: Combines Create + Clockworks realistic physics with beautiful landscape generation and a lot of Vanilla + improvements.
body:
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91c930387f55017347c36e2e7ba2a4e150efbb26.webp)
⚙️ Gears of Innovation is the Perfekt Create modpack for people who want to play Create with a lot of Vanilla + mods, all create addons and want to experience Clockworks realistic physics while staying the vanuilla style true.

This modpack aims to make it look like it's all Vanilla, but with huge World generation improvements like these:


<details>
<summary>Click to view</summary>

![Terralith + Tectonic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e5d989291ad85b88702357bad74a58f3b58b10f.jpeg)

</details>



⚡ We also want to provide smooth gameplay on any hardwear, so we tried optimising it to the limit. It's actually runs with more FPS than vanilla, while support running viewdistance way over 500 chunks.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5e5dcfee4a148fcfbbcdaac49d93fbca4a78fc8.webp)
🌟 This modpack provides the following features 🌟
- ⚙️ Create and nearly all it's addons.
- 🌍 Epic world generation with Terralith + Tectonic as well with updated structures.
- 🛋️ Lots of building/decoration mods
- ⚡A bunch of performance mods, this modpack actually runs better than Vanilla. Also a potate Pc can run this ;D.
- ☀️ Complete Shader support.
- 🧰 We also provide Clockwork, the popular mod that provides real physics and allow you to build flying constructions. Here is an good example of an Mecarm Click here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QP35RtfTKJA)
- 🚀 And of cource other Vanilla + and other mods.

![Bisecthosting 25%off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7a69dbba2d448d47458b84a68a6a7a2080158a8.webp)
[25% Click here](https://bisecthosting.com/bisecthosting)

![FAQ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3849401506082b2878745985a89e0d07b8eba31.webp)

<details>
<summary>Can I use this on a Public SMP?</summary>

Yes, of course! But please link this page for downloads and don't share a direct download with your players.

</details>

<details>
<summary>How can I host this on my Server?</summary>

Just upload the Mods to your server, there are enought tutorials online. And easy option is to create a [Bisecthosting server here with 25% off](https://bisecthosting.com/theminemat) and install the pack with 1 click

</details>


![socials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51f5a5ffe49cc2f3e048eefb8f5d17c75967b9d7.webp)
